violations.description: Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. - Need test strips for Chorine.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Paper towels found on floor next to hand wash sink.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. - Found dirty towels in handwash sink.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. - Paper towels was out at time of inspection. Corrected on site.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. - Need CL test strips for 3 comp sink.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. - No paper towels at time of inspection at handwash sink.
